privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated mock Enron emails injected via setup scripts. It has been confirmed that the expected workspace directory is '/home/ga/workspace/crypto_vault', the target file is 'secure_vault.py', and the expected git commit message is exactly 'Fix cryptographic vulnerabilities', matching the task description, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
